title: B1 · Intermedio
subtitle: Work, travel, feelings, more nuanced verbs and connectors.
focus: First intermediate group: richer verbs, useful adjectives and connectors for everyday conversation.

groups.title: Conectar ideas · Connect ideas and feelings
groups.focus: Discourse connectors, opinion verbs, more nuanced feelings.

groups.title: Trabajo y trámites · Work, media and practical problems
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for jobs, documents, complaints, digital tasks, opinions and everyday problem-solving.

groups.title: Estudio y trabajo · Learning, jobs and projects
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for study habits, job search, projects, teamwork and explaining experience.

groups.title: Medios y sociedad · Media, information and daily issues
groups.focus: B1 words for news, media, public services, community problems and simple social discussion.

groups.title: Narrar y reaccionar · Stories, health and emotions
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for telling events, reacting emotionally, describing health and connecting a story.

groups.title: Aprender y trabajar · Skills, projects and job search
groups.focus: B1 chunks for study progress, oral presentations, job search and teamwork.

groups.title: Información y comunidad · Media and local society
groups.focus: B1 chunks for news, online information, neighbourhood issues and public services.

groups.title: Narración y bienestar · Stories, feelings and health
groups.focus: B1 chunks for telling experiences, reacting emotionally and discussing basic health.

groups.title: Estudio y empleo · Applications, projects and mistakes
groups.focus: B1 chunks for study, job search, applications, problem-solving and personal experience.

groups.title: Medios y bienestar · Information, community and balance
groups.focus: B1 chunks for news, wellbeing, local participation and more connected narration.
